hero.title: Premium digital products, beautifully presented for fast global shopping.
hero.subtitle: Manual product import, trusted seller metadata, instant search, clean white gradients, and a premium storefront built for modern buyers.

sections.announcement: Fresh white-gradient marketplace UI with manual import workflow.

featureCards.title: Fast discovery
featureCards.text: Smart typo-aware search and clear product filtering.

featureCards.title: Curated quality
featureCards.text: Seller details, reviews, and performance shown in each listing.

featureCards.title: Admin control
featureCards.text: Import products, add image links, edit prices, and publish updates.
